steps.title: Identify the two situations being compared
steps.content: Sentence 1 states Srisawat's typical practice: she custom-fits garments to each actor. Sentence 2 describes what she did for Sunshine: she had a factory reproduce the suit in a few standard sizes, lacking a tailor-made quality. The second situation departs from her usual approach.

steps.title: Determine the logical relationship
steps.content: The Sunshine project contradicts her normal custom-fit method, so the transition must signal contrast or concession ('despite her usual practice, this time...').

steps.title: Eliminate by rule violated
steps.content:
• "Nevertheless,": signals contrast/concession, matching the shift from custom-fitting to standard sizes. ✓
  • "Thus,": signals cause-effect, but standard-size suits are not a consequence of custom-fitting. ✗
  • "Likewise,": signals similarity, but standard sizing is the opposite of custom fitting. ✗
  • "Moreover,": signals addition of a similar point, but the Sunshine example contradicts rather than adds to her usual method. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
